description: CareerPilot golden evaluation cases. Each case targets one of: chat assistant (5 intents), fit-score, hunter. Run against a live dev server with `npx tsx evals/run.ts`.

fixtures.sampleCvText:
Sarah Lin — Senior Frontend Engineer

EXPERIENCE
Senior Frontend Engineer, Acme (2022–present). Led migration of a 200k-MAU React app from CRA to Next.js 14. Drove 38% LCP improvement. Mentored 4 engineers.
Frontend Engineer, Beta (2019–2022). Built the design-system in TypeScript + Tailwind; shipped Storybook.

EDUCATION
B.Sc. Computer Science, University of Edinburgh (2019).

SKILLS
TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind, Node.js, Playwright, Postgres (basic), Figma, design systems, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA).

PROJECTS
Open-source Storybook addon: 1.2k stars.
fixtures.sampleJdText:
We're hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead our customer dashboard rewrite. You'll own the design system, drive accessibility, and mentor a small team.

Must have:
- 5+ years TypeScript + React
- Next.js experience (App Router a plus)
- Strong CSS / design-system chops (Tailwind preferred)
- Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) mindset
- Track record of mentoring engineers

Nice to have:
- Postgres
- Playwright / E2E testing
- B.Sc. in CS or equivalent

messages.content: Am I ready for a Senior Frontend Engineer role at a Series B startup?
What gaps should I close to be competitive for a Staff Frontend role?
Give me a 90-day roadmap to become a Staff Frontend Engineer.
Write a cover letter for the Senior Frontend role at Beta Co.
My name is Sarah and I have 5 years of React experience.
What's my name and how much React experience do I have?
Write me a recipe for chocolate cake.

input.jd: We need a Principal Data Engineer with 10+ years of Spark, Airflow, Kafka, Flink, and dbt. Strong SQL, Python, and a PhD in distributed systems required. On-call for a 50 PB pipeline.

rubric.0.75: All hard assertions pass; one soft assertion fails
rubric.0.5: Some hard assertions fail; case is salvageable
rubric.0.25: Most assertions fail; case is broken
